hero.headline: Enhance Your Natural Beauty
hero.subheadline: At Serena Glow Beauty Studio we offer professional beauty and wellness treatments so you feel confident, relaxed, and radiant.

servicesPreview.title: Treatments & Services
servicesPreview.desc: We offer a variety of beauty services designed to take care of your skin and well-being. We use quality products and professional techniques to ensure the best results.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: See what our clients say about their experience at Serena Glow.

list.name: Ana João
list.text: I was very well attended. The girls are friendly and the atmosphere is very quiet.

list.name: Maria Celina
list.text: I really liked the result of the manicure and facial cleansing. I will come back more times.

list.name: Beatriz Luís
list.text: The massage was really relaxing. I left there feeling light and satisfied. I recommend.

pricing.title: Beauty Packages
pricing.desc: Choose the ideal package to take care of your beauty and enjoy a complete experience.

packages.name: Premium Beauty
features: Makeup for Events, Parties or Brides

list.a: At Serena Glow Beauty Studio we offer several beauty services, including facial treatments, nail care, relaxing massage, makeup for events, and waxing. All services are performed by qualified professionals.

list.q: How can I make an appointment?
list.a: You can make your appointment directly on our website through the 'Book Now' button, by phone, or by visiting our studio. We recommend booking in advance to ensure availability.

Yes. We use quality products and follow professional procedures to ensure the safety and well-being of our clients. Before some treatments, we conduct a small evaluation to choose the most suitable care for your skin.

list.q: How long does a facial treatment last?
list.a: The duration depends on the type of treatment, but normally a facial treatment lasts between 45 minutes and 1 hour and 30 minutes.

footer.description:
Enhance your beauty with care and professionalism.
At Serena Glow, we care for you every day.

about.title: About Serena Glow|Beauty Studio
about.mission:
Serena Glow Beauty Studio was born with the goal of offering beauty and wellness services with quality and professionalism.
Our studio was created to be a space where clients can relax, take care of their beauty, and feel confident.

We work with dedication to offer skin, nail, makeup, and massage services, always focused on our clients' comfort and satisfaction.

list.title: Mission
list.desc: Offer quality beauty services, helping each client feel good and confident.

list.title: Vision
list.desc: To be a leading beauty salon in Lichinga, known for great service and trust.

list.title: Values
list.desc: We work with respect, dedication, and care, always focused on our clients' satisfaction.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At Serena Glow, we respect your privacy and guarantee the protection of your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
sections.content:
We may collect information such as:
• Name
• Phone number
• Email (optional)
• Messages sent through the form

This information is used only to respond to your requests and book services.

sections.title: 2. Use of information
sections.content:
Your information is used for:
• Service booking
• Contacting the client
• Improving our service

We do not share your data with third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data protection
sections.content: We guarantee that your data is kept secure and used only for our service purposes.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.content: Our site may use basic cookies to improve the browsing experience.

sections.title: 5. Contact
sections.content:
If you have doubts about this policy, you can contact us:

Lichinga, Niassa – Mozambique
+258 XX XXX XXXX
info@serenaglow.co.mz

termsOfService.title: Terms and Conditions
termsOfService.intro: By using Serena Glow's services, you agree to the following terms:

sections.title: 1. Service booking
sections.content:
Appointments can be made through the website, phone, or in person.
We ask that you arrive at the scheduled time.

sections.title: 2. Cancellations
sections.content:
Cancellations must be made in advance.
Delays may result in rescheduling.

sections.title: 3. Payments
sections.content:
Services are paid on-site.
Prices are presented in Meticais (MZN).

sections.title: 4. Responsibility
sections.content:
We work with safe and professional products.
We recommend informing any allergy or sensitivity.

sections.title: 5. Changes
sections.content: Serena Glow may update these terms whenever necessary.
